title: Today view fixed — CSS columns bug, Stories real sessions, visual polish
summary: Fixed critical Today view layout bug (CSS multi-column was slicing cards across 3 columns). Implemented today-view class toggle. Fixed Stories sidebar to show real Claude sessions from session-log.json with left color bar design. Added word-boundary title truncation. Today is now the default landing view with proper intraday sort.
decisions: feed.today-view class forces columns:1 when Today is active
column-span:all on .td-wrap as CSS fallback
Stories sidebar: title first (text-1), project name below in color — not dot + stacked project/title
Word-boundary truncation at 34 chars with ellipsis
activePeriod defaults to 'today' on load
ideas: Right panel of Today view — show today session count or yesterday summary instead of placeholder
GitHub Pages version shows Demo — need auto-push of session-log.json to keep it live

title: H&H social pipeline — Edificio Vento content plan, 4 captions ready
summary: Checked H&H Airtable CRM — 11 properties all from Edificio Vento development in Torrevieja (€158K–€488K). No Social Posts table exists yet, Postiz not connected for H&H. Wrote full content plan with 4 complete Facebook/Instagram captions + Facebook group teasers. Identified 4 blockers before automation goes live: Postiz channels, Airtable property flags, Remotion Navy/Gold template, Social Posts table.
decisions: Content plan saved before automation — don't build automation to empty Airtable
Posting schedule: Tue/Thu/Sat for Edificio Vento series
Remotion H&H template needed: Navy #1E2A38, Gold #B39960, DM Sans
ideas: Add Social Posts table to H&H Airtable base

title: H&H CRM outreach — Gmail drafts created for active clients
summary: Created Gmail outreach drafts for H&H CRM clients. Three draft emails created via Gmail API.
decisions: Draft-first approach — review before sending

title: H&H FB group morning post — blocked by screen lock (Run 45)
summary: Chrome extension connected, tab opened to facebook.com/hanssonhertzell but all page interaction tools returned Permission denied. Same recurring screen-lock issue. No post shared. Requires unlocked screen + active user session + caffeinate -d to run successfully.
decisions: Screen must be unlocked for Chrome extension Facebook permissions
Run caffeinate -d in Terminal before triggering task
ideas: Schedule FB post tasks only during active working hours, not overnight

title: NBHCB social pipeline — 5 posts scheduled (77 turns)
summary: Full social pipeline run for New Build Homes Costa Blanca. All 5 posts scheduled across channels. Logged to Airtable.
decisions: 5 posts scheduled this run
Airtable log updated after scheduling

title: NBHCB blog pipeline — running (22 turns, content audit in progress)
summary: Blog pipeline running — 22 assistant turns. Currently auditing approved status of blog articles and compiling what's new to add. Still in progress.

title: Daily client outreach — 10 Gmail drafts for Swedish Costa Blanca leads
summary: Creating 10 personalised Gmail outreach drafts for Swedish clients with general Costa Blanca interest. Currently generating first 5. All clients are Swedish-language segment.
decisions: Swedish-language drafts for all 10 clients
Costa Blanca general interest segment targeted

title: PropertyOS valuation engine — PDF v6, audit pipeline, Inmocosta live
summary: Built full PDF valuation report generator with ReportLab. Iterated v1→v6 on layout, fonts, Casafari data integration. Added agency audit pipeline (agency_audit.py). Generated live audit PDF for Inmocosta.
decisions: ReportLab for PDF generation
Casafari as valuation data source
Agency audit as standalone tool
Custom font stack for brand consistency

title: PropertyOS video reel pipeline — real property walkthrough clips
summary: Built full pipeline: listing URL → scrape real data → download YouTube walkthrough → extract best clips at 10s/23s/45s → render Remotion reel. No stock footage. Real property video as hero. Three-template suite planned: standard, Cinematic (slow fades, luxury), TikTok Rapid.
decisions: Use real YouTube walkthrough clips extracted from listing URL
Extract 3 clips at 10s, 23s, 45s as default keyframes
Three templates: standard, Cinematic, TikTok Rapid
ideas: Cinematic variant next — slow fades, luxury feel
TikTok Rapid variant with video cuts instead of stills

title: W18 newsletter sent — 2,010 subscribers, CB South English
summary: Built and sent Week 18 newsletter to all active non-Swedish CB South subscribers. 5 properties featured: Villa Villamartin €599k, Villa San Miguel €425k, Apartment Punta Prima €345k, Villa Orihuela Costa €279k, Bungalow Villamartin €169k. Campaign scheduled and queued via MailerLite API.
decisions: Send to all non-Swedish CB South (English + Spanish + French + Dutch)
5 properties per newsletter
MailerLite schedule_campaign for instant delivery

title: Opero Audit — Richard James v2 white theme pptx
summary: Built v2 of the Richard James agency audit deck with white theme. Score: 39. Split cover layout — dark navy left panel, white right with big score as hero. White cards with light borders for all pillar slides. CRITICAL red tags on priority actions pop hard on white background. Dual versions: dark v1 for in-person walkthroughs, light v2 for web embed/email PDF.
decisions: White theme v2 alongside dark v1 — both kept
Dark v1 for in-person presentations, light v2 for email/web
CRITICAL red tags more alarming on white — right effect for sales conversations
ideas: Send v2 as PDF to Richard James prospect

title: Day 10 — Sprint finale: Context Full CTA, cross-session bridge, visual diff complete
summary: Final sprint day. Completed all visual diff fixes against design-spec (Sprint card, toggle pills, T7 260px right panel, Decisions section). Built Context Full → Start New Window CTA that detects fillPct>75 and opens seed modal with carry-forward brief. Added Claude usage pill to topbar (sessions today, compactions, API key indicator). Fixed T2 grid view to pure masonry per spec. Built cross-session block bridge: session-log.json + /log-session MCP endpoint + log-session.py — any Cowork session can now post to Storyboard.
decisions: Context Full CTA uses existing seed modal infrastructure
fillPct threshold 75% for Start New Window vs Carry forward
Claude usage pill shows sessions today + compactions, polls on data refresh
T2 grid = pure masonry, T2 list = journal/narrative (split)
Cross-session bridge writes to session-log.json, /blocks merges it automatically
log-session.py falls back to direct file write if MCP offline
SESSION_LOG_FILE constant added to mcp-server.js
ideas: Auto-call log-session.py at end of every Cowork session via skill
Usage widget could poll Anthropic API if key set
Context Full CTA: add estimated tokens remaining

title: Day 10 sprint complete — pushed to GitHub Pages
summary: All Day 10 features shipped and live. T3 board task-window columns, T5 compaction dividers, dynamic sprint pill, context-full Start New Window CTA, Claude usage pill, cross-session logging bridge. Sprint closed.
decisions: Cross-session logging via session-log.json merged at /blocks
log-session.py CLI from any Cowork session
Sprint pill dynamically calculated from April 12 start

Airtable→MailerLite group sync for active clients

Investigate sitemap regeneration not running on deploys

title: v10 snapshot saved — pre-Today-feed redesign
summary: Saved app-v10-snapshot.html (14,849 lines) before starting UX iteration on Today view. Audit findings: Today filter shows project cards not session feed, Stories/Boards distinction unclear, sidebar overloaded, server-off false negative.
decisions: Always snapshot before visual iterations
Today feed is the one targeted change — no wider redesign
